blocks.text: Cursor real CLI evidence is opt-in and is only PASS when the provider roundtrip creates the expected daemon-selected workdir artifact.

items: The adapter passes `--workspace <cwd>` and `--trust` for the daemon-selected workdir.
The daemon adapter must not default to Cursor `--yolo`.
The real CLI integration gate requires `AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION=1`, local Cursor auth, `ResultCompleted`, and artifact verification.
